[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0011111000 5
2 1100101011 6
3 0110011011 6
4 0011100010 4
5 0010111001 5
6 1000000110 3
7 1110000011 5

01 10 0000101000 2
12 21 0100001011 4
23 32 0010000010 2
34 43 0010100000 2
45 54 0000000000 a match 0
56 65 1000000010 2
67 76 1110000011 5 match 7
70 07 0010000000 1

02 20 0010011000 3
13 31 0000100010 2
24 42 0010011001 4
35 53 0000000010 1
46 64 0010000001 2
57 75 1000000110 3 match 6
60 06 0010000000 1
71 17 1100000011 4

03 30 0011100000 3
14 41 0000101001 3
25 52 0000000010 1
36 63 0010000010 2
47 74 0010000001 2
50 05 0000000000 a match 0
61 16 1100000011 4
72 27 0110000011 4

04 40 0010111000 4
15 51 1000000010 2
26 62 0110000011 4
37 73 0010000010 2
[completion]
